name: English Toffee Refrigerator Cake
recipeInstructions:
Makes 12 servings
1. Melt the chocolate and let it cool.
2. Combine milk, granulated sugar, and beaten egg yolks in the top of a double boiler. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until thickened. Let it cool.
3. Cream together butter and powdered sugar, then add the cooled chocolate mixture.
4. Blend into the cooled egg-yolk mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold them into the chocolate mixture. Blend well.
6. Combine graham cracker crumbs and pecans. Sprinkle half of this mixture over the bottom of an 8-inch square pan. Pour the chocolate mixture into the pan, then top with the remaining crumb and nut mixture.
7. Chill for 24 hours.
8. To serve, cut the cake into squares and garnish with whipped topping.
